14 days, no questions asked. If it doesn't fit your workflow, reply to the receipt email and we refund you.

validationMetric: Drive 300-500 targeted visits; target 5+ sales in 14 days at list price
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <1% conversion after 500 targeted visits, or <2 sales in 14 days
biggestRisk: Commoditised; piracy & refunds; needs constant distribution to keep selling
first10: Post a free sample in 3 relevant subreddits/Discords; list on Gumroad Discover; 1 short demo clip
